title: Midnight Oil
content:
Cut if you will, with Sleep's dull knife,
        Each day to half its length, my friend,--
    The years that Time takes off my life,
        He'll take from off the other end!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edna St. Vincent Millay, titled "Midnight Oil", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
